Step 1: Do a web search for latest AI news today. Step 2: Summarize 5-7 interesting AI news items in a short digestible format. Step 3: Use message(action=send, channel=telegram, target=7924461837) to send to Nemesis. Keep it short, fun, varied. If fails, message error to same target.
Current time: Monday, April 13th, 2026 - 2:00 AM (UTC) / 2026-04-13 02:00 UTC
